_meta.name: Three Act
_meta.description: The default template. Hero first, then proof of work, then commitments. Works for most roles and seniority levels.
_meta.best_for: General purpose. Senior IC, founding designer, player-coach. Any role where identity and narrative need to come before the work.

signal_cards.note: Signals are injected inline into act1_hero when include_signals_inline is true. signal_cards section is skipped.

act3_bring.note: Credibility anchors are in the brief for codegen context. They do not render on the page.
